title: Advance guard condition is indirect: found_u128 + 1 > start + 1
description: The condition 'if found_u128 + 1 > start + 1' requires mental arithmetic to evaluate. It simplifies to 'if found_u128 > start', which is the actual semantic: 'Sapling skipped at least one invalid diversifier'. Rewrite as: if found_u128 > start { wallet_store.set_diversifier_index(0, found_u128 + 1).await... }. The current form is not wrong but makes the reader pause.
